specs.usb_outputs: USB-C 5V Power OUT, USB-A 5V Power OUT
specs.features: ON / OFF Switch, Battery Level Indicator, Battery Check button
specs.compatible_devices: Argon NEO 5, Argon ONE V5, Bare Raspberry Pi 4, Bare Raspberry Pi 5, Argon ONE V3, Argon NEO, Argon POLY+, Argon POLY+5
specs.dimensions: 145 × 108 × 38.5 cm [NOTE: flagged as likely data entry error]
specs.battery_check_button: Yes; displays charge level via LED indicator
specs.battery_level_indicator: Multi-LED system; behavior varies by state
specs.communication_interface: USB-C data link via included e-marker cable
specs.onboard_mcu: Yes; enables communication with Raspberry Pi 5
specs.also_compatible_with: Raspberry Pi 4, Argon ONE V3, Argon ONE V5, Argon NEO, Argon NEO 5, Argon POLY+, Argon POLY+5
specs.not_supported_on: Raspberry Pi Zero, Raspberry Pi Zero W, Argon ONE V2

snapshot.description: 27W UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) for Raspberry Pi 5 with a 5,000 mAh battery. Compact UPS for shorter runtime needs. USB-C PD 27W output for full RPi 5 performance.
features: USB-C Power Delivery input and output
Onboard MCU for Raspberry Pi power monitoring
Battery check button with multi-LED indicator
Included Argon E-marker USB-C to USB-C cable
Smart fuel gauge calibration for accurate runtime estimates
